所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

T

Task - 程序包 Task
 
Task - Task中的类
The Task class represents a task with an ID, name, status, and monetary value.
Task() - 类的构造器 Task.Task
Instantiates a new Task with default values
Task(int, String, double) - 类的构造器 Task.Task
Instantiates a new Task with the specified ID, name, and monetary value.
taskDeleter(String, String) - 类中的方法 login.AccountInfoWriter
Deletes a task from the user's task file.
taskFinish(String, double) - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
Task finish boolean.
TaskLoader - Task中的类
The TaskLoader class is responsible for creating and initializing Task objects.
TaskLoader() - 类的构造器 Task.TaskLoader
Instantiates a new Task loader.
taskModifier(String, String, String, Double) - 类中的方法 login.AccountInfoWriter
Modifies an existing task's details.
taskSubmit(String, String, String) - 类中的方法 login.AccountInfoWriter
Submits a task for verification by a parent, creating a notification for the parent about the task submission.
test - login中的类
The test class serves as a testing environment for various methods and functionalities related to account and task management.
test - Task中的类
The test class contains the main method which serves as the entry point for the application.
test() - 类的构造器 login.test
 
test() - 类的构造器 Task.test
 
transfer(String, String, double) - 类中的方法 AccountType.Account
Transfer used to transfer money between two accounts and create log
